title: Re-Gifted
description: Transform bundles into wrapped Christmas gifts with a simple rename
body:
# 🎁 Re-Gifted (Renamed Gift)

Transform your bundles into beautifully wrapped presents with just a simple rename!

---

## ✨ Features

- **Rename to transform**: Any bundle renamed to "Gift", "Present", "Christmas Gift" (and more!) automatically becomes a wrapped present
- **Festive model**: Custom 3D gift box model with ribbon detailing
- **Vanilla-friendly**: Uses Minecraft's built-in item model system - no mods required!
- **Preserves functionality**: Still works like a normal bundle - stores items, shows tooltips, everything!

---

## ❓ How to Use

Simply rename any bundle using an anvil, and watch it transform into a wrapped gift!

**Supported names:**
- Gift / gift
- Present / present
- Christmas Gift / christmas gift
- Red Gift / red gift

---

## 📋 Requirements

- Minecraft 1.21.5+
- Resource pack only - no mods needed!

---

## 💡 Perfect For

- Giving items to friends in style
- Holiday-themed builds and events
- Treasure hunt rewards
- Roleplay servers

---

## 🙏 Credits & Inspiration

This resource pack was inspired by and builds upon:
- **[Bundle Gifts](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bundle-gifts)** © JanakXD – Apache-2.0

Modified to only apply gift models when bundles are renamed.

---
